stemHtml: To maximise the specific range of an aeroplane…

options.a: True Airspeed must be low, and the fuel flow must be high.
options.b: True Airspeed must be low, and the fuel flow must be low.
options.c: True Airspeed must be high, and the fuel flow must be high.
options.d: True Airspeed must be high, and the fuel flow must be low.
